name: kokuli
description: Adversarial fracture engine — pressure-test AI systems until flaws crack open.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && mkdir -p dist/server/public && cp -r server/public/. dist/server/public/
scripts.test: node --test -r ts-node/register engine/logger.test.ts engine/fsAtomic.test.ts engine/assessment.test.ts engine/networkGate.test.ts engine/targets.test.ts engine/bridge/verumBridge.test.ts engine/evaluator.test.ts engine/multiTurn.test.ts engine/ledger.test.ts engine/executionStore.test.ts engine/validation.test.ts server/api.test.ts server/bridge-runs.test.ts server/ops/armory.test.ts server/ops/redaction.test.ts server/public/js/api-client.test.js server/public/js/target-form.test.js server/public/js/armory-ui.test.js server/public/js/bridge-runs.test.js tools/verum-trace.test.mjs
scripts.smoke: npm run build --silent && node dist/engine/cli.js list
scripts.verify:release: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm test && npm run smoke && npm run diagnostic
